zh.lifeSummary: 當Benjamin Lamprey於1661年9月28日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓時，他的父親Henry Lamprey47歲，母親Gillyen Julien Ann Morris45歲。他於1687年11月10日與Jane Batchelder在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1752年1月3日在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benjamin Lamprey于1661年9月28日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓时，他的父亲Henry Lamprey47岁，母亲Gillyen Julien Ann Morris45岁。他于1687年11月10日与Jane Batchelder在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1752年1月3日在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lamprey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English lamprey ‘lamprey’ (Old English lamprede), an eel-like fish which was a highly prized food among the upper classes in medieval England, especially in pies, and required as payment of rent by some lords of manors. The nickname may have been given to someone who provided lampreys for the lord's table or who resembled a lamprey, perhaps a slippery fellow or a lecher.

variants.name: Lansberry
meanings: English: from Bedfordshire and Northamptonshire, originally from Launchbury, a development from   Lamprey  .
Possibly an altered form of German   Landsberg  .

nameMeanings.name: Benjamin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the youngest of the twelve sons of Jacob. His mother Rachel died in giving birth to him, and in her last moments she named him Benoni, meaning ‘son of my sorrow’. His father, however, did not wish him to bear such an ill-omened name, and renamed him Benyamin (Genesis 35:16–18; 42:4). This means either ‘son of the right hand’ or more likely ‘son of the south’ (Hebrew yamin can also mean ‘south’), since Benjamin was the only child of Jacob born in Canaan and not in Mesopotamia to the north. Another tradition is that the second element of the name is a variant of the Hebrew plural noun yamim, which means ‘days’ but is used idiomatically to mean ‘year’ or ‘years’. The name would then mean ‘son of (my) old age’ and refer to the fact that Benjamin was Jacob's youngest child. In the Middle Ages the name was often given to sons whose mothers had died in childbirth. Today it has no such unfortunate associations and it grew enormously in popularity following the release of the film The Graduate ( 1967 ), in which Dustin Hoffman played the role of Benjamin Braddock . It is used in Scotland as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Beathan .

en.lifeSummary: When Benjamin Lamprey was born on 28 September 1661, in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, his father, Henry Lamprey, was 47 and his mother, Gillyen Julien Ann Morris, was 45. He married Jane Batchelder on 10 November 1687, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 3 January 1752, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benjamin Lamprey est né le 28 septembre 1661, à Hampton, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Lamprey, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Gillyen Julien Ann Morris, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Jane Batchelder le 10 novembre 1687, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 3 janvier 1752, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benjamin Lamprey am 28. September 1661 in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Lamprey 47 und seine Mutter Gillyen Julien Ann Morris 45. Er hat am 10. November 1687 in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten Jane Batchelder geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Januar 1752 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Lamprey è nato il il 28 settembre 1661 nel Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Henry Lamprey, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Gillyen Julien Ann Morris, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Jane Batchelder il 10 novembre 1687, nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 gennaio 1752, nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Benjamin Lampreyが1661年9月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアハンプトンで生まれた時，父Henry Lampreyは47歳，母Gillyen Julien Ann Morrisは45歳であった。1687年11月10日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンでJane Batchelderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1752年1月3日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Benjamin Lamprey(이)가 1661년 9월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Lamprey(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Gillyen Julien Ann Morris(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1687년 11월 10일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴에서 Jane Batchelder(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1752년 1월 3일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.28 September 1661–3 January 1752: 28 de setembro de 1661–3 de janeiro de 1752

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Lamprey nasceu em 28 de setembro de 1661, em Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Lamprey, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Gillyen Julien Ann Morris, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Batchelder em 10 de novembro de 1687, em Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1752, em Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benjamin Lamprey родился 28 сентября 1661 г. в местности хамптон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Henry Lamprey было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Gillyen Julien Ann Morris, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Batchelder 10 ноября 1687 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 3 января 1752 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benjamin Lamprey nació el 28 de septiembre de 1661, en Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Henry Lamprey, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Gillyen Julien Ann Morris, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Jane Batchelder el 10 de noviembre de 1687, en Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de enero de 1752, en Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 90 años.
